title: Manager - Mechanical (Building Services)
description:
The Opportunity

We have an exciting opportunity for experienced Manager – Mechanical (Building Services) to join our Building Services team in Singapore and become part of a network of over 400 Building Services Engineers across the Asia Pacific. Work with diverse clients on various projects, enhancing your technical skills. Be part of a motivated team in a supportive culture that values your contributions. We offer numerous technical and leadership challenges to help you grow professionally.

About You

We’re looking for someone who loves to learn and share knowledge – someone who can bring a fresh perspective to ensure the development of the people around them and who constantly seeks better practice for the overall quality of our work and our client experience

Your passion, design and problem-solving mindset will be matched with a desire to work on meaningful and significant projects with the team.If you enjoy working for an organization that values partnership, tenacity, enjoyment and cares for its people and clients, then look no further than Beca.

Responsibilities

In this role, you will be responsible to:

· Deliver operational excellence through effective management of complex technical solutions and large and complex Mechanical projects / multiple jobs

· Work on mechanical projects from inception, through strategic planning and concept to detailed design planning and resourcing effectively to meet budgets and targets

· Lead and manage M&E project teams by outlining and assigning work, reviewing technical accuracy and technical outcomes

· Identify and implement profit maximisation and cost management strategies

· Responsible for analysis of information, production of design, tenders, proposals and technical report writing

· Assist in coordination of quality assurance and commissioning of designs with other disciplines and other design consultants

· In charge of jobs control, planning, monitoring, progress and job cost reporting

· Respond to client enquiries about technical issues in a way that maximises understanding

· Demonstrate effective communication, presentation, networking and consulting skills

· Mentor and coach junior peers across the M&E discipline

Key Requirements

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering (recognized by Professional Engineers Board, Singapore, will be an advantage)
  • At least 7 years of experience from an engineering consulting environment is preferred
  • Certified Professional Engineer will be an advantage
  • Experience leading roles for design & design management of healthcare, commercial and/or institutional projects
  • Familiarity with codes of practice, relevant regulations and a working knowledge of authority submission and approval procedures
  • Competent user of relevant engineering software, Building Information Modelling and Navisworks
  • Excellent delegation and communication skills, which see you enlist the help of others to meet objectives
  • A team, client and delivery focused working style

What we offer

· Career growth and development

· Medical & Telecommunication Allowance

· Annual Wage Supplement & Variable Bonus

· Volunteer & Wellbeing Leave

· A supportive and caring work environment

· Opportunities to learn from our industry experts technical gurus

About Beca

Beca is one of Asia Pacific’s largest independent advisory, design and engineering consultancies. After a century of operation, we have grown from a family-owned business to one of the most progressive, client-centric professional services consultants in our region. We have more than 4,000 employees in 25 offices around the world and have delivered projects in more than 70 countries.

Our employee-ownership model remains key to our future. It underpins our commitment to building and sustaining long-term relationships with our clients, it helps drive our positive, purpose-driven and growth-oriented culture, it sets us apart from our competitors, and it gives meaning to our social contract.

‘Creative people together transforming our world’ is our vision. It reflects our culture, our aspirations and our purpose - to make every day better. We create value through understanding and delivering successful solutions, exceptional service and our enduring relationships and use our skills and systems to empower innovation; helping our clients shape communities, optimise their assets and streamline their operations. Find out more about us at www.beca.com.

Apply Now

Ready to make everyday better? Apply online today!

If this sounds like the opportunity you have been waiting for, apply online now with your CV. Please include the following information in your resume:

· Education background

· Work experiences

· Current and Expected salary

· Date of availability / Notice Period


The Beca Group of Companies is an Equal Opportunity Employer and all applications are kept strictly confidential.

postedCompany.description:
BECA CARTER HOLLINGS & FERNER (S.E.ASIA) PTE LTD


Who we are

Beca Singapore office opened to support the evolving Buildings sector providing project management and engineering consultancy services to commercial building developers and industrial clients. Beca is one of Asia Pacific’s leading multidisciplinary consultancies and has operated in over 70 countries.

With around 3000 employees, our employee owned organisation has the diversity of experience and expertise to tackle major projects. We have over 95 years’ experience in successful client relationships, technical excellence & delivering award-winning project solutions.


About Beca

Our clients do incredible things every day. They are transforming their communities and changing lives through the structures they build, the products they manufacture, the services they provide, and the families they support. And we are right there alongside them. We are the problem-solvers – the thinkers, the creators, the planners and practitioners – who understand their vision and make things happen! We are 3000-plus professionals spread across 19 offices across the Asia Pacific.

While our experience has been 100 years in the making, it’s the fresh talent we’re nurturing, the innovative thinking we’re developing and the connections that we’re forging that get us most excited for the future.
